ucs.title: [LLM] GALLIUM (Soft Cell) China Chopper / web shell deployment on internet-facing IIS / WildFly servers
ucs.description: Hunts GALLIUM's signature initial-access tradecraft from Operation Soft Cell: exploitation of unpatched internet-facing servers (WildFly/JBoss, IIS, Exchange) followed by drop of China Chopper or modified ASPXSpy web shells under web-server worker process context. This chain (T1190 -> T1505.003 -> T1059.003) is GALLIUM/Granite Typhoon's most repeatable telecom-intrusion pattern reported by Microsoft and Cybereason.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_id) as pid from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("w3wp.exe","httpd.exe","tomcat*.exe","java.exe","standalone.exe","UMWorkerProcess.exe")) AND (Processes.process_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","whoami.exe","ipconfig.exe","systeminfo.exe","quser.exe","tasklist.exe","reg.exe","sc.exe","wmic.exe","ntdsutil.exe","vssadmin.exe","hostname.exe")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval gallium_recon=if(match(cmdline,"(?i)(net\s+(user|group|localgroup|view|use)|whoami\s*/all|ipconfig\s*/all|systeminfo|quser|nltest|net\s+group\s+\"domain admins\")"),1,0) | eval gallium_persist=if(match(cmdline,"(?i)(net\s+user\s+\S+\s+\S+\s+/add|net\s+localgroup\s+administrators\s+\S+\s+/add|reg\s+add.*Run|sc\s+create)"),1,0) | eval gallium_creddump=if(match(cmdline,"(?i)(ntdsutil|vssadmin\s+create\s+shadow|reg\s+save\s+hklm\\\\sam|reg\s+save\s+hklm\\\\security|comsvcs\.dll.*MiniDump|procdump.*lsass)"),1,0) | eval score=gallium_recon+gallium_persist+(gallium_creddump*3) | where score>=2 | sort - score lastTime
ucs.kql:
let webshell_parents = dynamic(["w3wp.exe","httpd.exe","tomcat.exe","java.exe","standalone.exe","UMWorkerProcess.exe"]);
let hands_on_kbd = dynamic(["cmd.exe","powershell.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","whoami.exe","ipconfig.exe","systeminfo.exe","quser.exe","tasklist.exe","reg.exe","sc.exe","wmic.exe","ntdsutil.exe","vssadmin.exe","hostname.exe","nltest.exe","netstat.exe"]);
let shell_activity = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (webshell_parents)
| where FileName in~ (hands_on_kbd)
| extend Recon = iff(ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(net\s+(user|group|localgroup|view|use)|whoami\s*/all|ipconfig\s*/all|systeminfo|quser|nltest|net\s+group\s+""domain admins"")", 1, 0)
| extend Persist = iff(ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(net\s+user\s+\S+\s+\S+\s+/add|net\s+localgroup\s+administrators\s+\S+\s+/add|reg\s+add.*Run|sc\s+create)", 1, 0)
| extend CredDump = iff(ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(ntdsutil|vssadmin\s+create\s+shadow|reg\s+save\s+hklm\\sam|reg\s+save\s+hklm\\security|comsvcs\.dll.*MiniDump|procdump.*lsass)", 1, 0)
| extend Score = Recon + Persist + (CredDump*3);
let webshell_files = DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (webshell_parents)
| where FileName endswith ".aspx" or FileName endswith ".ashx" or FileName endswith ".jsp" or FileName endswith ".jspx" or FileName endswith ".php"
| where FolderPath has_any ("inetpub\\wwwroot","wwwroot","webapps","htdocs","ClientAccess","FrontEnd\\HttpProxy","Owa\\auth")
| project FileWriteTime=Timestamp, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath, SHA256, InitiatingProcessFileName;
shell_activity
| summarize TotalScore=sum(Score), Cmds=make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 50), FirstSeen=min(Timestamp), LastSeen=max(Timestamp) by DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| where TotalScore >= 2
| join kind=leftouter (webshell_files) on DeviceName
| order by TotalScore desc, LastSeen desc
ucs.rationale: GALLIUM/Granite Typhoon's documented kill chain in Operation Soft Cell begins with exploitation of internet-facing servers (notably WildFly/JBoss and IIS/Exchange) followed by web shells (China Chopper, modified ASPXSpy) used as the launchpad for net.exe / wmic / ntdsutil reconnaissance and credential dumping. Pivoting on a web-server worker process spawning recon+credential-access binaries within

ucs.title: [LLM] GALLIUM HTRAN/Mimikatz hands-on-keyboard: SOCKS proxy + DCSync from telecom jump host
ucs.description: Hunts GALLIUM's mid-stage tradecraft: deploying HTRAN as a TCP/SOCKS relay (T1090.002) on compromised servers, harvesting credentials with their patched Mimikatz/PsExec/NBTScan toolset (T1003.001/T1003.002), then pivoting via WMI (T1047) and SMB (T1570) across the telco network. The combination of an outbound long-lived relay socket plus DCSync/lsass access from the same host within the same session is highly characteristic of GALLIUM's Soft Cell intrusions.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest_port IN (443,53,80,1080,3389) AND All_Traffic.direction="outbound" by All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.dest All_Traffic.dest_port All_Traffic.app _time span=10m | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)` | stats sum(count) as bytes_sessions dc(dest) as uniq_dest min(_time) as firstSeen max(_time) as lastSeen by src dest_port | eval duration_min=(lastSeen-firstSeen)/60 | where duration_min>120 AND uniq_dest<=3 | join type=inner src [| tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("wmic.exe","psexec.exe","paexec.exe","ntdsutil.exe","reg.exe","rundll32.exe","powershell.exe")) AND (Processes.process IN ("*comsvcs.dll*MiniDump*","*lsass*","*ntdsutil*ifm*","*reg*save*hklm\\sam*","*reg*save*hklm\\security*","*wmic*/node*process call create*","*-pwd*","*sekurlsa*","*lsadump*")) by Processes.dest Processes.process Processes.user | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename dest as src | stats values(process) as cred_or_lateral_cmds values(user) as user by src] | eval gallium_chain="long-lived outbound relay + cred/lateral hands-on-kbd from same host" | table src dest_port duration_min uniq_dest user cred_or_lateral_cmds gallium_chain firstSeen lastSeen
ucs.kql:
let lookback = 7d;
let long_relay = DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where ActionType == "ConnectionSuccess" and RemotePort in (443, 53, 80, 1080, 3389)
| where RemoteIPType !in ("Private","Loopback","Reserved")
| summarize Sessions=count(), Dests=dcount(RemoteIP), FirstSeen=min(Timestamp), LastSeen=max(Timestamp), Procs=make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 20)
    by DeviceName, RemotePort, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessSHA256
| extend DurationMin = datetime_diff('minute', LastSeen, FirstSeen)
| where DurationMin > 120 and Dests <= 3
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","outlook.exe","teams.exe","onedrive.exe","svchost.exe","MsMpEng.exe");
let creds_lateral = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (FileName in~ ("wmic.exe","psexec.exe","paexec.exe","ntdsutil.exe","rundll32.exe","reg.exe","powershell.exe"))
| where ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(comsvcs\.dll.*MiniDump|sekurlsa|lsadump|ntdsutil.*ifm|reg\s+save\s+hklm\\(sam|security|system)|wmic\s+/node:.*process\s+call\s+create|psexec.*-s\s+cmd|net\s+use\s+\\\\)"
| summarize Cmds=make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 25), CredFirst=min(Timestamp), CredLast=max(Timestamp), Users=make_set(AccountName, 10) by DeviceName;
long_relay
| join kind=inner creds_lateral on DeviceName
| where CredLast between (FirstSeen .. LastSeen) or CredFirst between (FirstSeen .. LastSeen)
| project DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessSHA256, RemotePort, DurationMin, Dests, Users, Cmds, FirstSeen, LastSeen, CredFirst, CredLast
| order by DurationMin desc
ucs.rationale: Cybereason and Microsoft both document GALLIUM/Granite Typhoon's reliance on HTRAN as a TCP/SOCKS relay co-located with their patched Mimikatz, modified PsExec, and NBTScan for harvesting telecom subscriber/CDR data. Looking for a single host that maintains long-duration outbound sessions to a small number of foreign IPs while concurrently running LSASS-dump / NTDS / WMI-lateral commands captures
